channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: AI micro-dramas are shaking up Chinese entertainment
item.description: "Discover how AI micro-dramas are revolutionizing the Chinese entertainment scene. From scripted shows to interactive experiences, AI is changing the game. Learn more about this exciting trend: https://www.economist.com/china/2026/04/09/ai-micro-dramas-are-shaking-up-chinese-entertainment"
